LanguageData.Ammo_MEG.label: Geth Thermal clip
LanguageData.Ammo_MEG.description: Thermal clips designed to fit most geth weapons. They are, however, incompatible with weapons made by other races.
LanguageData.Ammo_ML77CE.label: ML-77 Missile
LanguageData.Ammo_ML77CE.description: Rocket-propelled missile designed for the ML-77. After being fired a rocket motor kicks in to propel the grenade further.
LanguageData.Bullet_ML77CE.label: ML77 Missile
LanguageData.Bullet_GethRifle.label: phasic slugs
LanguageData.Bullet_GethSMG.label: superconducting toroids
LanguageData.Bullet_GethShotgun.label: superconducting projectiles
LanguageData.Bullet_M98_Geth.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_GethSniper.label: ferrofluid
LanguageData.Bullet_GethSpitfire.label: superconducting toroids
LanguageData.Bullet_GethCannon.label: Geth pulse cannon plasma
